documentation.readme: A next-generation crawling and spidering framework
usage_sections: Features: - Fast And fully configurable web crawling - Standard and Headless mode - JavaScript parsing / crawling - Customizable automatic form filling - Scope control - Preconfigured field / Regex - Knowledge base - ML page-type / form classification (auto-downloaded model) - Customizable

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with projectdiscovery/uncover (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with projectdiscovery/tlsx (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with projectdiscovery/subfinder (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 5: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the recon category. Fits when the engagement needs: A next-generation crawling and spidering framework.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: A next-generation crawling and spidering framework.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: docker run projectdiscovery/katana:latest -u https://tesla.com; docker run projectdiscovery/katana:latest -u https://tesla.com -system-chrome -headless. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `CGO_ENABLED=1 go install github.com/projectdiscovery/katana/cmd/katana@latest`. Further invocations from upstream: `docker run projectdiscovery/katana:latest -u $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL`; `docker run projectdiscovery/katana:latest -u $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL -system-chrome -headless`. A next-generation crawling and spidering framework.

name: katana
summary: A next-generation crawling and spidering framework

trust.warning: Attribution / index entry only. The operator must audit the code, the README, the license, and the releases before invoking. Phase 5 — entry is auto-generated from the operator's curated fetch list; no automated enrichment yet.
